mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO a_stock_rss ( id, art_code, stock_code, stock_name, title, tag, link, pub_date, create_time, event_type, signal_side, signal_score, cluster_key ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{artCode}, #{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{title}, #{tag}, #{link}, #{pubDate}, #{createTime}, #{eventType}, #{signalSide}, #{signalScore}, #{clusterKey} )
